final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input [7:0] d,
    output reg [7:0] q);
    
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
    begin end  // redundant
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 8'b00000000;
        end else if (enable) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
endmodule
